query: SELECT contract_no, amount, raw_json->>'$.remark' as remark, raw_json->>'$.bad_debt_amount' as bad_debt, raw_json->>'$.close_installment_amount' as close_amt, raw_json->>'$.unlock_fee_paid' as unlock_fee FROM payment_transactions WHERE section = 'Fastfone365' AND (raw_json->>'$.bad_debt_amount' > 0 OR raw_json->>'$.unlock_fee_paid' > 0) LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT contract_no, amount, raw_json->>'$.remark' as remark, raw_json->>'$.bad_debt_amount' as bad_debt, raw_json->>'$.close_installment_amount' as close_amt, raw_json->>'$.unlock_fee_paid' as unlock_fee FROM payment_transactions WHERE section = 'Fastfone365' AND (raw_json->>'$.bad_debt_amount' > 0 OR raw_json->>'$.unlock_fee_paid' > 0) LIMIT 5;
